languages.text: "Ваша преданность неоспорима, капитан. Пасую перед ней. Ваши предложения?"
"Your loyalty is undeniable, Captain. I yield. Your suggestions?"
languages.original_text: "Ваша преданность неоспорима, капитан. Пасую перед ней. Ваши предложения?"

traits.locale_text: "Your loyalty is undeniable, Captain. I yield. Your suggestions?"
"Your loyalty is undeniable, Captain. I yield. Your suggestions?"
"Your loyalty is undeniable, Captain. I yield. Your suggestions?"

languages.text: 「あなたの忠誠心は疑いようがない、艦長。私の負けだ。あなたの提案は？」
languages.original_text: "Your loyalty is undeniable, Captain. I yield. Your suggestions?"

traits.locale_text: 「あなたの忠誠心は疑いようがありません、艦長。私は降伏します。あなたの提案は？」

languages.text: "Sadakatin inkâr edilemez Yüzbaşı. Pes ediyorum. Önerilerin neler?"
languages.original_text: "Your loyalty is undeniable, Captain. I yield. Your suggestions?"

traits.locale_text: "Sadakatin inkâr edilemez Yüzbaşı. Pes ediyorum. Önerilerin neler?"

languages.text: «Su lealtad es innegable, capitana. Me rindo. ¿Qué sugiere?».
languages.original_text: "Your loyalty is undeniable, Captain. I yield. Your suggestions?"

traits.locale_text: «Su lealtad es innegable, capitana. Me rindo. ¿Qué sugiere?».

languages.text: “你的忠诚毋庸置疑。好吧，我让步。你有什么建议吗，上尉？”
languages.original_text: "Your loyalty is undeniable, Captain. I yield. Your suggestions?"

traits.locale_text: “你的忠诚毋庸置疑。好吧，我让步。你有什么建议吗，上尉？”

languages.text: « Votre loyauté est indéniable, capitaine. Très bien, vous avez gagné. Que suggérez-vous ? »
languages.original_text: "Your loyalty is undeniable, Captain. I yield. Your suggestions?"

traits.locale_text: « Votre loyauté est indéniable, capitaine. Très bien, vous avez gagné. Que suggérez-vous ? »

languages.text: "Eure Loyalität ist unbestritten, Captain. Ich ergebe mich. Was schlagt Ihr vor?"
languages.original_text: "Your loyalty is undeniable, Captain. I yield. Your suggestions?"

traits.locale_text: "Eure Loyalität ist unbestritten, Captain. Ich ergebe mich. Was schlagt Ihr vor?"
